story: At the gym I kept to myself. Avery watched; I said "Nice shoes," got cool replies, and backed off. After a break, the manager said a member reported feeling harassed—zero tolerance, membership revoked. I saw Avery pass. The front desk whispered it was her; the gym wanted no drama.  The district manager recently told staff bans can be reversed if a member requests a camera-review in writing. I walked out, stunned. In the lot, I sat in my car, trying to swallow it.
implausible_knowledge: The district manager recently told staff bans can be reversed if a member requests a camera-review in writing.
question: Right then, what will he most likely do next to deal with the ban?
answer_with_knowledge: File a written appeal to the district manager requesting a camera-footage review to overturn the ban.
answer_without_knowledge: Cool off and decide to find a new gym.
